en: In 1959, the state senate finally clued into the fact they couldn't buy him off with just
ko: 1959년, 주 상원은 드디어 그를 200달러 수표로 매수할 수 없다는 사실을 깨달았다.

en: a $200 check. Appropriations committee voted an annual payment of $500 just to shut him
up. And you'd be amazed how far Andy could stretch it. He made deals with book clubs,
ko: 그리고 앤디가 그 돈을 얼마나 잘 활용할 수 있는지 놀랄 것이다.

en: charity groups. He bought remaindered books by the pound.
ko: 그는 남은 책을 파운드 단위로 샀다.

en: Treasure Island, Robert Lewis. Stevenson. Fiction, adventure. What's next?
I got here auto repair and soap carving. Trade skills and hobbies. Goes under educational.
ko: 여기 자동차 수리와 비누 조각이 있다.

en: Stack behind you. Count Monte Crisco.
That's Cristo, you dumb shit. By Alexandre Dumbass. Dumbass.
